scripts.test:postgres:required: node --input-type=module -e "import { existsSync } from 'node:fs'; const suites = ['src/server/postgresMigration.test.ts', 'src/server/postgresWalletAuthenticationStore.test.ts', 'src/server/postgresWalletAuthenticationRuntime.integration.test.ts']; if (suites.some((suite) => !existsSync(suite))) { console.error('Required wallet authentication PostgreSQL suites are not implemented.'); process.exit(1); }" && vitest run src/server/postgresMigration.test.ts src/server/postgresWalletAuthenticationStore.test.ts src/server/postgresWalletAuthenticationRuntime.integration.test.ts
scripts.test:task-template-catalog:postgres:requ: node --input-type=module -e "import { existsSync } from 'node:fs'; const suites = ['src/server/postgresMigration.test.ts', 'src/server/postgresWalletAuthenticationStore.test.ts', 'src/server/postgresWalletAuthenticationRuntime.integration.test.ts', 'src/server/postgresTaskTemplateCatalogStore.test.ts', 'src/server/taskTemplateCatalogAdoption.integration.test.ts', 'src/server/taskTemplateCatalogPerformance.integration.test.ts', 'src/server/postgresTaskTemplateCatalogRuntime.integration.test.ts']; if (suites.some((suite) => !existsSync(suite))) { console.error('Required task template catalog PostgreSQL suites are not implemented.'); process.exit(1); } if (!process.env.CAMPAIGN_OS_TEST_DATABASE_URL?.trim()) { console.error('Required task template catalog PostgreSQL database is not configured.'); process.exit(1); }" && CAMPAIGN_OS_REQUIRE_POSTGRES_TESTS=1 npm run test:task-template-catalog:postgres
scripts.test:task-template-catalog:stage:require: node --input-type=module -e "import { existsSync } from 'node:fs'; const suites = ['src/server/taskTemplateCatalogStageRuntime.test.ts', 'src/server/backendRuntimeSmoke.test.ts']; if (suites.some((suite) => !existsSync(suite))) { console.error('Required task template catalog stage suites are not implemented.'); process.exit(1); }" && npm run server:task-template-catalog-stage:check
